name: Attack Boost
description: Increases attack power.

name: Resentment
description: Increases attack when you have recoverable damage (the red portion of your Health Gauge).

name: Adrenaline Rush
description: Temporarily increases attack power after executing a perfectly-timed evade just as a monster attacks.

name: Offensive Guard
description: Temporarily increases attack power after executing a perfectly-timed guard.

name: Peak Performance
description: Increases attack when your health is full.

name: Counterstrike
description: Temporarily increases attack power after being knocked back.
level_2_effect: Attack +15 while active. Moderately extends effect time.
level_3_effect: Attack +25 while active. Extends effect time.

name: Critical Boost
description: Increases the damage of critical hits.
level_1_effect: Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 28%.
level_2_effect: Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 31%.
level_3_effect: Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 34%.
level_4_effect: Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 37%.
level_5_effect: Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 40%.

name: Critical Eye
description: Increases affinity.

name: Critical Draw
description: Increases affinity when performing draw attacks. (Not effective while riding.)

name: Weakness Exploit
description: Increases the affinity of attacks that exploit a monster's weak points and wounds.
level_1_effect: Attacks that hit weak points gain affinity +5%, with an extra 3% on wounds.
level_2_effect: Attacks that hit weak points gain affinity +10%, with an extra 5% on wounds.
level_3_effect: Attacks that hit weak points gain affinity +15%, with an extra 10% on wounds.
level_4_effect: Attacks that hit weak points have 20% increased affinity, with an extra 15% on wounds.
level_5_effect: Attacks that hit weak points have 30% increased affinity, with an extra 20% on wounds.

name: Maximum Might
description: Increases affinity if stamina is kept full for a period of time.

name: Fire Attack
description: Increases fire element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.)

name: Water Attack
description: Increases water element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.)

name: Thunder Attack
description: Increases thunder element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.)

name: Ice Attack
description: Increases ice element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.)

name: Dragon Attack
description: Increases dragon element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.)

name: Poison Attack
description: Increases the rate of poison buildup. (Poison buildup has a maximum limit.)

name: Paralysis Attack
description: Increases the rate of paralysis buildup. (Paralysis buildup has a maximum limit.)

name: Sleep Attack
description: Increases the rate of sleep buildup. (Sleep buildup has a maximum limit.)

name: Blast Attack
description: Increases the rate of blast buildup. (Blast buildup has a maximum limit.)

name: Critical Element
description: Increases elemental damage (fire, water, thunder, ice, dragon) when landing critical hits.
level_1_effect: Slightly increases elemental damage while active.
level_3_effect: Greatly increases elemental damage while active.

name: Critical Status
description: Increases abnormal status effects (paralysis, poison, sleep, blast) when landing critical hits.
level_1_effect: Slightly increases abnormal status effects when landing critical hits.
level_2_effect: Increases abnormal status effects when landing critical hits.
level_3_effect: Greatly increases abnormal status effects when landing critical hits.

name: Charge Master
description: Increases element power and status buildup for charged attacks.
level_1_effect: Slightly increases elemental damage and status buildup for charged attacks.
level_2_effect: Increases elemental damage and status buildup for charged attacks.
level_3_effect: Greatly increases elemental damage and status buildup for charged attacks.

name: Convert Element
description: After taking elemental damage, temporarily grants you dragon element effects. (Cooldown after effect ends.)
level_1_effect: While active, deals extra dragon damage after dealing enough elemental damage. Slightly increases dragon attack.
level_2_effect: Increases additional dragon damage and increases dragon attack.
level_3_effect: Further increases additional dragon damage and greatly increases dragon attack

name: Handicraft
description: Extends the weapon sharpness gauge. However, it will not increase the gauge past its maximum.

name: Razor Sharp
description: Prevents your weapon from losing sharpness.
level_1_effect: Grants a 10% chance of no sharpness loss.
level_2_effect: Grants a 25% chance of no sharpness loss.
level_3_effect: Grants a 50% chance of no sharpness loss.

name: Protective Polish
description: Weapon sharpness does not decrease for a set time after sharpening.
level_1_effect: Grants no sharpness loss for 30 seconds after activation.
level_2_effect: Grants no sharpness loss for 60 seconds after activation.
level_3_effect: Grants no sharpness loss for 90 seconds after activation.

name: Mind's Eye
description: Your attacks are deflected less and deal more damage to hard targets.
level_1_effect: 50% chance of your attacks not being deflected, +10% damage to hard targets.
level_2_effect: 100% chance of your attacks not being deflected, +15% damage to hard targets.
level_3_effect: 100% chance of your attacks not being deflected, +30% damage to hard targets.

name: Master's Touch
description: Prevents your weapon from losing sharpness during critical hits.
level_1_effect: Grants an 80% chance of no sharpness loss while active.

name: Bludgeoner
description: Increases attack power when your weapon sharpness is low.
level_1_effect: 5% attack power when your sharpness gauge is yellow or lower.
level_2_effect: 10% attack power when your sharpness gauge is yellow or lower.
level_3_effect: 10% attack power when your sharpness gauge is green or lower.

name: Normal Shots
description: Increases the attack power of Normal Ammo, normal arrows, and Flying Swallow Shot.
level_1_effect: Slightly increases the power of specified ammo and arrows.

name: Piercing Shots
description: Increases the attack of the bowgun's Pierce Ammo, and the bow's Dragon Piercer and Thousand Dragons.
level_1_effect: Slightly increases the power of specified ammo and arrows.

name: Spread-Power Shots
description: Increases the attack of the bowgun's Spread Ammo and the bow's Power Shots and Quick Shots.
level_1_effect: Slightly increases the power of specified ammo and arrows.

name: Ballistics
description: Extends the range in which ammo and arrows have maximum power.

name: Rapid Fire Up
description: Improves light bowgun rapid fire.

name: Special Ammo Boost
description: Increases the power of the bowgun's special ammo, and the bow's Dragon Piercer, Thousand Dragons, and Tracer.
level_1_effect: Moderately increases the power of specified ammo and arrows.
level_2_effect: Increases the power of specified ammo and arrows.

name: Poison Functionality
description: Allows you to apply poison coatings.

name: Para Functionality
description: Allows you to apply paralysis coatings.

name: Sleep Functionality
description: Allows you to apply sleep coatings.

name: Blast Functionality
description: Allows you to apply blast coatings.

name: Opening Shot
description: Increases the bowgun's reload speed and increases the power of bullets when fully loaded.
level_1_effect: Moderately increases bowgun reload speed and attack power of ammo when certain conditions are met.
level_2_effect: Increases bowgun reload speed and attack power of ammo when certain conditions are met.
level_3_effect: Greatly increases bowgun reload speed and attack power of ammo when certain conditions are met.

name: Tetrad Shot
description: Increases affinity of bowgun ammo/ coatings from the fourth shot and attack of the fourth and sixth shots.
level_1_effect: Slightly increases the attack power and affinity of ammo after certain conditions are met.
level_2_effect: Moderately increases attack power and affinity of ammo after certain conditions are met.
level_3_effect: Increases the attack power and affinity of ammo after certain conditions are met.

name: Evading Reload
description: TBA

name: Defense Boost
description: Increases defense. Also improves resistances at higher levels.

name: Divine Blessing
description: Has a predetermined chance of reducing the damage you take.
level_1_effect: While active, reduces damage taken by 15%.
level_2_effect: While active, reduces damage taken by 30%.
level_3_effect: While active, reduces damage taken by 50%.

name: Fire Resistance
description: Increases fire resistance. Also improves defense at higher levels.

name: Water Resistance
description: Increases water resistance. Also improves defense at higher levels.

name: Thunder Resistance
description: Increases thunder resistance. Also improves defense at higher levels.

name: Ice Resistance
description: Increases ice resistance. Also improves defense at higher levels.

name: Dragon Resistance
description: Increases dragon resistance. Also improves defense at higher levels.

name: Poison Resistance
description: Reduces damage while poisoned.
level_1_effect: Reduces the number of times you take poison damage.
level_2_effect: Greatly reduces the number of times you take poison damage.

name: Paralysis Resistance
description: Reduces the duration of paralysis.
level_1_effect: Reduces the duration of paralysis by 30%.
level_2_effect: Reduces the duration of paralysis by 60%.

name: Sleep Resistance
description: Reduces the duration of sleep.
level_1_effect: Reduces the duration of sleep by 30%.
level_2_effect: Reduces the duration of sleep by 60%.

name: Iron Skin
description: Grants protection against defense down.
level_1_effect: Reduces the duration of defense down by 50%.
level_2_effect: Reduces the duration of defense down by 75%.

name: Blight Resistance
description: Grants protection against all elemental blights.
level_1_effect: Reduces the duration of all elemental blights by 50%.
level_2_effect: Reduces the duration of all elemental blights by 75%.

name: Stun Resistance
description: Reduces the duration of stun.
level_1_effect: Reduces the duration of stun by 30%.
level_2_effect: Reduces the duration of stun by 60%.

name: Bleeding Resistance
description: Grants protection against bleeding.

name: Bind Resistance
description: Grants protection against webbed status and frostblight.
level_1_effect: Allows you to quickly recover from webbed status or frostblight.
level_2_effect: Allows you to very quickly recover from webbed status or frostblight.

name: Blast Resistance
description: Grants protection against blastblight.
level_1_effect: Delays blastblight and reduces blast damage.
level_2_effect: Greatly delays blastblight and greatly reduces blast damage.

name: Adaptability
description: Grants protection against environmental damage, such as from heat or cold.
level_1_effect: Negates the effects of heat and cold.

name: Recovery Up
description: Increases the amount recovered when restoring health.

name: Recovery Speed
description: Speeds healing of recoverable damage (the red portion of the Health Gauge).
level_1_effect: Doubles the speed at which you heal recoverable damage.
level_2_effect: Triples the speed at which you heal recoverable damage.
level_3_effect: Quadruples the speed at which you heal recoverable damage.

name: Survival Expert
description: Extra health is recovered from environmental interactables.

name: Constitution
description: Reduces stamina depletion when evading, blocking, or doing certain other actions.

name: Stamina Surge
description: Speeds up stamina recovery.

name: Marathon Runner
description: Slows down stamina depletion for actions that continuously drain stamina (such as dashing).

name: Hunger Resistance
description: Reduces maximum stamina depletion over time.
level_1_effect: Extends the time until your stamina cap reduces by 50%.
level_2_effect: Extends the time until your stamina cap reduces by 100%.
level_3_effect: Prevents your stamina cap from decreasing.

name: Agitator
description: Increases attack power and affinity when large monsters become enraged.

name: Latent Power
description: Temporarily increases affinity and reduces stamina depletion when certain conditions are met.
level_1_effect: While active, affinity +10% and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.
level_2_effect: While active, affinity +20% and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.
level_3_effect: While active, affinity +30% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
level_4_effect: While active, affinity +40% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
level_5_effect: While active, affinity +50% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.

name: Burst
description: Continuously landing hits gradually increases attack and elemental attack. (Amount increased depends on weapon.)
level_1_effect: On first hit, gain a small temporary attack and element boost, replaced by a larger boost after the fifth hit.
level_2_effect: Hit 5 successive times for a moderate stat boost.
level_3_effect: Hit 5 successive times for a bigger stat boost.
level_4_effect: Hit 5 successive times for an even bigger stat boost.
level_5_effect: Hit 5 successive times for a huge stat boost.

name: Flayer
description: Makes it easier to inflict wounds. Upon inflicting enough damage, also deals additional non-elemental damage.
level_1_effect: Makes it ever so slightly easier to inflict wounds. Also deals additional non-elemental damage.
level_2_effect: Makes it moderately easier to inflict wounds. Also deals slightly more additional non-elemental damage.
level_3_effect: Makes it easier to inflict wounds. Also deals moderately more additional non-elemental damage.
level_4_effect: Makes it much easier to inflict wounds. Also deals more additional non-elemental damage.
level_5_effect: Makes it significantly easier to inflict wounds. Also deals much more additional non-elemental damage.

name: Heroics
description: Increases attack power and defense when health drops to 35% or lower.
level_5_effect: Attack +30% and defense-increasing effects are negated while active.

name: Palico Rally
description: Powers up Palicoes.
level_1_effect: Increases Palico attack power and defense by 5%.
level_2_effect: Increases Palico attack power and defense by 10%.
level_3_effect: Increases Palico attack power and defense by 15%.
level_4_effect: Increases Palico attack power and defense by 20%.
level_5_effect: Increases Palico attack power and defense by 25%.

name: Focus
description: Increases the fill rate for weapons with gauges and the charge rate for weapons with charge attacks.
level_1_effect: Slightly increases gauge fill rate and reduces charge times by 5%.
level_2_effect: Moderately increases gauge fill rate and reduces charge times by 10%.
level_3_effect: Increases gauge fill rate and reduces charge times by 15%.

name: Power Prolonger
description: Allows long swords, dual blades, insect glaives, switch axes, and charge blades to stay powered up longer.
level_1_effect: Moderately boosts the duration weapons are powered up.
level_2_effect: Boosts the duration weapons are powered up.
level_3_effect: Greatly boosts the duration weapons are powered up.

name: Punishing Draw
description: Adds a stun effect to draw attacks and slightly increases attack power. (Not effective while riding.)
level_1_effect: Draw attacks deal a small amount of stun damage and gain attack +3.
level_2_effect: Draw attacks deal a medium amount of stun damage and gain attack +5.
level_3_effect: Draw attacks deal a large amount of stun damage and gain attack +7.

name: Slugger
description: Makes it easier to stun monsters.

name: Stamina Thief
description: Increases certain attacks' ability to exhaust monsters.

name: Artillery
description: Strengthens explosive attacks like shells, Wyvern's Fire, charge blade phial attacks, and Sticky Ammo.
level_1_effect: Moderately increases each attack and Wyvern's Fire firing speed. Shelling fire attack +30.
level_2_effect: Increases each attack and Wyvern's Fire firing speed. Shelling fire attack +60.
level_3_effect: Greatly increases each attack and Wyvern's Fire firing speed. Shelling fire attack +90.

name: Rapid Morph
description: Increases switch speed and power for switch axes and charge blades.

name: Partbreaker
description: Makes it easier to break large monster parts, and increases damage dealt when destroying a wound with a Focus Strike.
level_1_effect: Increases part damage and damage dealt when conditions are met by 10%.
level_2_effect: Increases part damage and damage dealt when conditions are met by 20%.
level_3_effect: Increases part damage and damage dealt when conditions are met by 30%.

name: Foray
description: Increases attack power and affinity against large monsters affected by poison or paralysis.
level_1_effect: Attack +6 against large monsters affected by poison or paralysis.
level_2_effect: Attack +8 and affinity +5% against large monsters affected by poison or paralysis.
level_3_effect: Attack +10 and affinity +10% against large monsters affected by poison or paralysis.
level_4_effect: Attack +12 and affinity +15% against large monsters affected by poison or paralysis.
level_5_effect: Attack +15 and affinity +20% against large monsters affected by poison or paralysis.

name: Coalescence
description: Temporarily increases elemental attack power and status effects after recovering from blights or abnormal status.
level_1_effect: When active, grants a slight increase to elemental damage and status buildup.
level_2_effect: When active, grants an increase to elemental damage and status buildup.
level_3_effect: When active, grants a large increase to elemental damage and status buildup.

name: Ambush
description: Temporarily increases damage to large monsters with a successful Sneak Attack.

name: Antivirus
description: Once infected, makes it easier to overcome the Frenzy and increases affinity if cured.
level_1_effect: Slightly increases recovery rate after contracting the Frenzy. Affinity +3% if cured.
level_2_effect: Increases recovery rate after contracting the Frenzy. Affinity +6% if cured.
level_3_effect: Greatly increases recovery rate after contracting the Frenzy. Affinity +15% if cured.

name: Elemental Absorption
description: After taking elemental damage, temporarily grants you element effects. (Cooldown after effect ends)
level_1_effect: While active, slightly increases elemental attack, and resistance to element taken at activation by 4.
level_2_effect: While active, moderately increases elemental attack, and resistance to element taken at activation by 6.
level_3_effect: While active, increases elemental attack, and resistance to element taken at activation by 8.

name: Horn Maestro
description: Increases the effect duration of hunting horn melodies. (Effect lost when you change weapons.)
level_1_effect: Extends Melody Effect duration and increases the chance of larger heals from healing melodies.
level_2_effect: Greatly increases the effect duration of hunting horn melodies.

name: Charge Up
description: Increases your power to induce stun when you hit a monster with a hammer's charged attack.

name: Airborne
description: Increases the damage caused by jumping attacks.

name: Self-Improvement
description: Attack and defense increase as time passes while on a quest. (The maximum is reached after 30 minutes.)

name: Poison Duration Up
description: Extends the duration of your poison's effect on monsters.
level_1_effect: Extends the duration of your poison's effect by 20%.

name: Guard
description: Reduces knockbacks and stamina depletion when guarding.
level_1_effect: Slightly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 15%.
level_2_effect: Decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.
level_3_effect: Greatly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.

name: Evade Window
description: Extends the invulnerability period when evading.

name: Evade Extender
description: Increases evade distance.

name: Earplugs
description: Grants protection from large monsters' roars.
level_1_effect: Reduces the effects of weak monster roars.
level_2_effect: Nullifies weak monster roars and reduces the effects of strong monster roars.
level_3_effect: Nullifies weak and strong monster roars.

name: Guard Up
description: Allows you to guard against ordinarily unblockable attacks.

name: Quick Sheathe
description: Speeds up weapon sheathing.

name: Windproof
description: Grants protection against wind pressure.
level_1_effect: Negates minor wind pressure and halves the effects of major wind pressure.
level_2_effect: Negates minor and major wind pressure and halves the effects of dragon wind pressure.
level_3_effect: Negates all kinds of wind pressure.

name: Tremor Resistance
description: Grants protection against ground tremors.
level_1_effect: Nullifies very minor ground tremors and halves effects of minor ground tremors.
level_2_effect: Nullifies up to minor ground tremors and greatly reduces the effects of major ground tremors.

name: Flinch Free
description: Prevents knockbacks and other reactions to small damage.
level_2_effect: Prevents knockbacks. Tripping is reduced to a knockback instead.
